summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Budget Planner feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Budget page loads at /budgets, month selector works, Create Budget modal with 50/30/20 Rule and Start Fresh options, Add Category modal shows available expense categories, category groups are expandable/collapsible, budget summary shows Monthly Income/Total Budgeted/Left to Budget, progress bars show spent vs planned, inline editing works, linked data sections (Bills, Available Funds) display correctly.

issues: Minor: Some unused imports in Budgets.jsx (TrendingDown, Receipt, Edit3, RefreshCw, Loader2, loadingBudgets) - ESLint warnings

action_items: Remove unused imports from Budgets.jsx to clean up ESLint warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Budget Planner properly implements zero-based budgeting with 'Left to Budget' calculation
Category groups correctly map categories to groups (Housing, Transportation, Food, etc.)
Inline editing of budget amounts works correctly with Enter key or blur
Add Category modal correctly filters out already-budgeted categories
Create Budget modal offers 50/30/20 Rule, Copy Previous Month, and Start Fresh options
Linked data sections (Goals, Debts, Bills, Available Funds) conditionally render based on data availability
Backend PUT /api/budgets/{id} correctly updates category_budgets array
Drag-and-drop transaction assignment is implemented but requires uncategorized transactions to test
seed_data_creation: Test budgets created and cleaned up during testing. Existing February 2026 budget modified (Housing $100->$150, Utilities added at $100)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Planner feature fully tested. All CRUD operations work: GET /api/budgets (list, filter by month), POST /api/budgets (create with 409 for duplicates), GET /api/budgets/{id}, PUT /api/budgets/{id} (update category_budgets), DELETE /api/budgets/{id}. Linked data endpoints tested: /api/goals, /api/debts, /api/bills, /api/accounts, /api/transactions, /api/categories. UI features tested: month selector, category group expand/collapse, Add Category modal, Create Budget modal (50/30/20 Rule, Copy Previous Month, Start Fresh), inline budget editing, progress bars, linked data sections.

features_tested.month_selector: PASS - Dropdown works and switches between months
features_tested.create_budget_modal: PASS - Opens with 50/30/20 Rule, Copy Previous Month, Start Fresh options
features_tested.add_category_modal: PASS - Shows available expense categories not yet in budget
features_tested.category_groups_expandable: PASS - Housing, Transportation, Food, Entertainment, Other groups expand/collapse
features_tested.budget_summary: PASS - Shows Monthly Income, Total Budgeted, Left to Budget/Over Budget
features_tested.progress_bars: PASS - Show correct percentage of spent vs planned (0% for all categories)
features_tested.inline_editing: PASS - Click on amount to edit, Enter to save
features_tested.backend_put_budgets: PASS - PUT /api/budgets/{id} updates category budgets correctly
features_tested.linked_bills: PASS - Upcoming Bills section shows bills from /api/bills
features_tested.available_funds: PASS - Shows total across all accounts from /api/accounts

api_endpoints_tested.notes: Returns active goals for linked data
